title: T-072 — Docs gap: supplier_specs Phase 1 API/UI upload-view-review brief
prompt: Write a concise engineering brief for supplier_specs Phase 1 per 03-TECHNICAL-PRD §5.5 + §15A.3. Output design/specs/TEC-supplier-specs-phase1.md covering minimum API/UI contract for upload/view/review of supplier-provided raw material/component parameters, certificates, allergens, cost/quality constraints and approved supplier facts. Include taxonomy distinction from customer_spec and factory_spec, PO deviation review behavior, and BOM raw-material usability validation hooks. Do not implement app code.

pipeline_inputs.description: Docs gap brief for supplier_specs Phase 1 API/UI upload-view-review scope.
pipeline_inputs.details: Keep this as a brief/gap closure, not app implementation. Specify likely endpoints and UI tabs only at contract level; mark unresolved details explicitly.
acceptance_criteria: Given the brief is written, when reviewed, then it states supplier_specs is Phase 1 and distinct from customer_spec/factory_spec.
Given PO price/spec deviations are discussed, then the brief says they create review tasks/events and do not silently overwrite approved supplier_specs or BOM cost_per_kg.
Given BOM raw-material usability is discussed, then validation hooks include approved supplier, active supplier_spec, allergen compatibility, active item and QC/release status where configured.
risk_red_lines: Do not invent a supplier portal implementation for Phase 1.
Do not implement app code in this docs task.
